positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical forest scene at dawn. Central composition featuring oversized, interconnected flora and fauna: a sleeping fox curled amongst giant bioluminescent mushrooms, intertwined roots forming organic patterns, and delicate glowing fireflies casting warm pockets of light. Use a highly detailed, continuous contour line drawing style, reminiscent of Japanese woodblock prints mixed with Art Nouveau poster art. Limited color palette focused on deep forest greens, ethereal blues, warm gold accents, and stark white negative space. Strong contrast between the illuminated subjects and the deep background shadows. Perfect for printing on apparel. High resolution, symmetrical design.
